caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a plain, dark background. She wears a light green, short-sleeved tunic featuring a decorative embroidered neckline and small floral patterns, paired with a simple dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her garment. In the bottom left and right corners of the scene, a circular logo appears next to the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman speaks, her facial expressions shifting slightly. She begins with a neutral expression, then closes her eyes and tilts her head slightly as she continues talking, before reopening them and looking forward again. Her posture remains centered and stationary throughout the clip, with only her head and facial muscles moving to convey her speech.
